learnings.title: Count to 5
learnings.focus: Count a small group of objects up to five, one number for each.
lookFor: Touches each object once
Says one number per object
Knows the last number is how many

playgrounds.note: Add objects and count them out loud
Build a group with + and count the fruit out loud

learnings.title: Recognise 2D shapes
learnings.focus: Spot and name flat shapes by their sides and corners.
lookFor: Names a circle, square or triangle
Points to the sides and corners
Finds a matching shape
Counts the corners of a shape

playgrounds.note: Find the shape I call out

learnings.title: Compare sizes
learnings.focus: Compare two objects and say which is bigger or smaller.
lookFor: Says which is bigger
Puts objects in size order
Uses words like bigger and smaller
Makes something as big or as small as it can

playgrounds.note: Make objects big or small and compare them
Read the label to say which group is bigger, smaller or the same
Compare the long minute hand and the short hour hand

learnings.title: Compare amounts
learnings.focus: Compare two groups and say which has more or fewer.
lookFor: Says which group has more
Spots when groups are the same
Uses more and fewer

playgrounds.note: Build two groups and compare how many
Fill both boxes and read bigger, smaller or same

learnings.title: Take away
learnings.focus: Take some away and count how many are left.
lookFor: Removes objects one at a time
Counts how many are left
Stops when the group reaches the target

playgrounds.note: Build a group, then take some away and count what's left
Use − to take fruit away and count what's left

learnings.title: Make a repeating pattern
learnings.focus: Make and continue a simple repeating pattern.
lookFor: Copies a repeating pattern
Says what comes next
Spots a break in the pattern
Predicts what comes next

playgrounds.note: Lay objects in a repeating pattern

learnings.title: Use position words
learnings.focus: Use position words to say where an object is.
lookFor: Puts an object on top or under
Says where it is using words
Follows a position instruction

playgrounds.note: Move objects and say where they go

learnings.title: Move up, down, left, right
learnings.focus: Move an object up, down, left or right and say which way it went.
lookFor: Moves an object the way you ask
Names the direction it moved
Knows all four directions

playgrounds.note: Use the arrows to move the object up, down, left and right

learnings.title: Make a total
learnings.focus: Put two groups together and count how many there are altogether.
lookFor: Builds a group in each box
Watches the two groups join into the total
Counts the total out loud
Reads the numeral under each box

playgrounds.note: Fill both boxes with + and count the total altogether

learnings.title: Count to 10
learnings.focus: Count a group all the way to ten, adding one more each time.
lookFor: Counts past five up to ten
Adds one more and says the next number
Guesses the total before counting
Keeps going at their own pace

playgrounds.note: Press + to add one more and count up to ten
Count the numbers 1 to 12 around the clock face in order

learnings.title: Read the clock
learnings.focus: Read the numbers and hands on a clock to tell the time.
lookFor: Finds the numbers 1 to 12 on the clock
Names the hour and minute hands
Reads an o'clock time
Uses time words like o'clock

playgrounds.note: Read the numbers and move the hands to tell the time

learnings.title: Write numerals
learnings.focus: Trace numerals and learn how each number is written.
lookFor: Follows the number stroke with a finger
Starts at the right place
Traces the whole numeral
Names the number afterwards

playgrounds.note: Trace each numeral from start to finish
